name: Roasted Garlic Bread Spread
recipeInstructions:
1. Remove the roasted garlic cloves from the bulb and place them in a blender.
2. Add the remaining ingredients to the blender.
3. Ensure all ingredients are at room temperature before blending.
4. Blend until smooth and creamy.
5. Spread the mixture on Italian or French bread.
6. Top with grated cheese and broil until golden brown.
